editorial_accuracy.notes: Deep State page added with 10 documented profiles, 33 evidence items, all sourced to court filings/DOJ/verified journalism. Three-tier evidence system applied consistently. Cross-links to Chapter 28 and Israel Dossier.

information_design.notes: Deep State page: network map with category filtering, evidence tier filtering, search, alternating timeline view. Emoji removal: 15 custom SVG icons replace all emoji site-wide. Student access section added to membership.

ui_ux_typography.notes: SVG icons consistent with brand (stroke-based, 1.5px weight). Deep State hero dark section. Sticky section tabs. Mobile-responsive filters. Student form with proper validation UX.

code_quality.notes: Zero TypeScript errors. Zero TODOs. Zero `any` types. TierIcons component shared across 4 pages. Proper lazy loading for DeepStatePage. SEO meta tags with JSON-LD Article schema.

accessibility.notes: Deep State page: keyboard-navigable cards, proper heading hierarchy, aria-labels on icon buttons, evidence tiers have text labels + color + dot indicators. Student form has proper labels.

security.notes: ISSUE: Stripe payment links point to AeroLink Aviation LLC account, not Veritas Worldwide Press. Requires MCP reconnection by Brandon. Student auth is localStorage honor system (acceptable for MVP).
